en.title: Rotate by Custom Degrees
en.metaDescription: Rotate PDF pages by any angle. Precise custom rotation for straightening scanned documents.
en.description:
Rotate by Custom Degrees gives you precise control over your PDF page orientation. Unlike standard rotation tools that only support 90-degree increments, this tool allows you to rotate pages by any specific angle.

Perfect for straightening scanned documents that were fed slightly askew, or adjusting diagrams and charts to their correct orientation. You can correct individual pages or apply the same rotation to the entire document.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private while achieving perfect alignment.

howToUse.title: Upload PDF
howToUse.description: Upload the PDF file containing pages you need to rotate.

howToUse.title: Set Rotation Angle
howToUse.description: Enter the exact degree of rotation for each page, or set a batch angle for all pages.

howToUse.title: Preview and Adjust
howToUse.description: Use the real-time preview to ensure pages are perfectly aligned.

howToUse.title: Apply and Download
howToUse.description: Click Rotate to apply the changes and download your straightened PDF.

useCases.title: Scanned Documents
useCases.description: Straighten scanned pages that were fed into the scanner at an angle.

useCases.title: Technical Drawings
useCases.description: Adjust the orientation of technical diagrams and plans with precision.

useCases.title: Creative Layouts
useCases.description: Create unique layouts by rotating pages to specific artistic angles.

faq.question: Can I rotate by decimals, e.g., 45.5 degrees?
faq.answer: Currently the tool supports integer degrees, but we are working on enabling decimal precision.

faq.question: Does this affect the page content?
faq.answer: The content is visually rotated. The page size is automatically adjusted to fit the rotated content.

faq.question: Can I rotate just one page?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set a custom rotation angle for any individual page while leaving others unchanged.

zh.title: 自定义旋转 PDF
zh.metaDescription: 按任意角度旋转PDF页面。精确的自定义旋转，用于校正扫描文档。
zh.description:
自定义旋转 PDF 工具让您可以精确控制PDF页面的方向。与仅支持90度增量的标准旋转工具不同，此工具允许您按任何特定角度旋转页面。

非常适合校正扫描时稍微倾斜的文档，或将图表和图纸调整到正确的方向。您可以校正单个页面或对整个文档应用相同的旋转。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档在实现完美对齐的同时保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 上传包含需要旋转页面的PDF文件。

howToUse.title: 设置旋转角度
howToUse.description: 为每个页面输入精确的旋转度数，或为所有页面设置批量角度。

howToUse.title: 预览和调整
howToUse.description: 使用实时预览确保页面完美对齐。

howToUse.title: 应用并下载
howToUse.description: 点击旋转应用更改并下载校正后的PDF。

useCases.title: 扫描文档
useCases.description: 校正扫描时进纸倾斜的页面。

useCases.title: 技术图纸
useCases.description: 精确调整技术图表和平面图的方向。

useCases.title: 创意排版
useCases.description: 通过将页面旋转到特定艺术角度来创建独特的布局。

faq.question: 可以按小数旋转吗，例如45.5度？
faq.answer: 目前工具支持整数度数，但我们正在努力启用小数精度。

faq.question: 这会影响页面内容吗？
faq.answer: 内容会被视觉旋转。页面大小会自动调整以适应旋转后的内容。

faq.question: 可以只旋转一个页面吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以为任何单个页面设置自定义旋转角度，同时保持其他页面不变。

en.title: JPG to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert JPG images to PDF. Combine multiple JPG files into a single PDF document.
en.description:
JPG to PDF converts your JPEG images into PDF documents quickly and easily. Whether you have a single photo or multiple images, this tool creates professional-looking PDF files.

You can combine multiple JPG files into a single PDF, arrange them in any order, and customize page size and orientation. The conversion preserves image quality while creating compact, shareable PDF files.

All conversion happens in your browser, ensuring your photos remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload JPG Images
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your JPG files or click to select images from your device.

howToUse.title: Arrange and Configure
howToUse.description: Reorder images by dragging, and select page size and orientation options.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to create your PDF and download the result.

useCases.title: Photo Albums
useCases.description: Create PDF photo albums from vacation pictures or event photos for easy sharing.

useCases.title: Document Scanning
useCases.description: Convert phone camera photos of documents into proper PDF files.

useCases.title: Portfolio Creation
useCases.description: Compile photography work or design samples into a professional PDF portfolio.

faq.question: How many images can I convert?
faq.answer: You can convert up to 100 JPG images into a single PDF document.

faq.question: Will the image quality be preserved?
faq.answer: Yes, images are embedded at their original quality. You can optionally compress them to reduce file size.

faq.question: Can I set different page sizes for different images?
faq.answer: The tool applies a uniform page size to all pages. Each image is scaled to fit the selected page size while maintaining aspect ratio.

zh.title: JPG转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将JPG图像转换为PDF。将多个JPG文件合并成一个PDF文档。
zh.description:
JPG转PDF可以快速轻松地将您的JPEG图像转换为PDF文档。无论您有单张照片还是多张图像，这个工具都能创建专业外观的PDF文件。

您可以将多个JPG文件合并成一个PDF，按任意顺序排列，并自定义页面大小和方向。转换过程保留图像质量，同时创建紧凑、可共享的PDF文件。

所有转换都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的照片保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传JPG图像
howToUse.description: 拖放您的JPG文件或点击从设备中选择图像。

howToUse.title: 排列和配置
howToUse.description: 通过拖动重新排序图像，选择页面大小和方向选项。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 点击转换创建PDF并下载结果。

useCases.title: 照片相册
useCases.description: 从假期照片或活动照片创建PDF相册，便于分享。

useCases.title: 文档扫描
useCases.description: 将手机拍摄的文档照片转换为正式的PDF文件。

useCases.title: 作品集创建
useCases.description: 将摄影作品或设计样本编译成专业的PDF作品集。

faq.question: 可以转换多少张图像？
faq.answer: 您可以将最多100张JPG图像转换成一个PDF文档。

faq.question: 图像质量会保留吗？
faq.answer: 是的，图像以原始质量嵌入。您可以选择压缩它们以减小文件大小。

faq.question: 可以为不同图像设置不同的页面大小吗？
faq.answer: 该工具对所有页面应用统一的页面大小。每张图像都会缩放以适应所选页面大小，同时保持纵横比。

en.title: Sign PDF
en.metaDescription: Add electronic signatures to PDF documents. Draw, type, or upload your signature.
en.description:
Sign PDF allows you to add electronic signatures to your PDF documents quickly and securely. Create your signature by drawing, typing, or uploading an image, then place it anywhere on your document.

You can add multiple signatures to a single document, resize and position them precisely, and save your signature for future use. The tool is perfect for contracts, agreements, forms, and any document requiring your signature.

All signing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents and signature remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document you need to sign.

howToUse.title: Create Your Signature
howToUse.description: Draw your signature with mouse or touch, type your name to generate a signature, or upload a signature image.

howToUse.title: Place and Adjust
howToUse.description: Click on the document to place your signature, then drag to position and resize as needed.

howToUse.title: Save and Download
howToUse.description: Click Save to apply your signature and download the signed PDF.

useCases.title: Contract Signing
useCases.description: Sign contracts and agreements electronically without printing and scanning.

useCases.title: Form Completion
useCases.description: Add your signature to application forms, consent forms, and official documents.

useCases.title: Approval Workflows
useCases.description: Sign off on documents as part of review and approval processes.

faq.question: Is an electronic signature legally binding?
faq.answer: Electronic signatures are legally recognized in most countries. However, some documents may require specific types of digital signatures. Check your local regulations.

faq.question: Can I save my signature for future use?
faq.answer: Yes, you can save your signature to your browser's local storage for quick access when signing future documents.

faq.question: Can I add multiple signatures to one document?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add as many signatures as needed, positioning each one independently on any page.

zh.title: 签署PDF
zh.metaDescription: 为PDF文档添加电子签名。绘制、输入或上传您的签名。
zh.description:
签署PDF允许您快速安全地为PDF文档添加电子签名。通过绘制、输入或上传图像创建您的签名，然后将其放置在文档的任何位置。

您可以在单个文档中添加多个签名，精确调整大小和位置，并保存签名以供将来使用。该工具非常适合合同、协议、表单和任何需要签名的文档。

所有签名操作都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档和签名保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择需要签名的文档。

howToUse.title: 创建签名
howToUse.description: 用鼠标或触摸绘制签名，输入姓名生成签名，或上传签名图像。

howToUse.title: 放置和调整
howToUse.description: 点击文档放置签名，然后拖动定位和调整大小。

howToUse.title: 保存并下载
howToUse.description: 点击保存应用签名并下载已签名的PDF。

useCases.title: 合同签署
useCases.description: 电子签署合同和协议，无需打印和扫描。

useCases.title: 表单填写
useCases.description: 为申请表、同意书和官方文档添加签名。

useCases.title: 审批流程
useCases.description: 作为审阅和审批流程的一部分签署文档。

faq.question: 电子签名具有法律效力吗？
faq.answer: 电子签名在大多数国家都被法律认可。但是，某些文档可能需要特定类型的数字签名。请查阅当地法规。

faq.question: 可以保存签名以供将来使用吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以将签名保存到浏览器的本地存储中，以便在签署未来文档时快速访问。

faq.question: 可以在一个文档中添加多个签名吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以添加任意数量的签名，在任何页面上独立定位每个签名。

en.title: Crop PDF
en.metaDescription: Crop PDF pages to remove margins and unwanted areas. Trim PDF documents precisely.
en.description:
Crop PDF allows you to trim margins and remove unwanted areas from your PDF pages. This is useful for removing excess whitespace, focusing on specific content areas, or standardizing page dimensions.

You can crop all pages uniformly or adjust each page individually. The visual interface shows exactly what will be kept, making it easy to achieve precise results.

All cropping happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document you want to crop.

howToUse.title: Define Crop Area
howToUse.description: Drag the crop handles to define the area you want to keep, or enter precise measurements.

howToUse.title: Apply to Pages
howToUse.description: Choose to apply the crop to all pages or select specific pages to crop.

howToUse.title: Crop and Download
howToUse.description: Click Crop to apply the changes and download your cropped PDF.

useCases.title: Remove Margins
useCases.description: Trim excessive margins from scanned documents or PDFs with large borders.

useCases.title: Focus Content
useCases.description: Crop to highlight specific content areas, removing headers, footers, or sidebars.

useCases.title: Standardize Pages
useCases.description: Make all pages the same size by cropping to uniform dimensions.

faq.question: Does cropping permanently remove content?
faq.answer: Yes, cropping removes the content outside the crop area. Make sure to keep a backup of your original file.

faq.question: Can I crop different pages differently?
faq.answer: Yes, you can apply different crop settings to individual pages or groups of pages.

faq.question: Will cropping affect the text quality?
faq.answer: No, cropping only removes areas outside the crop boundary. The remaining content maintains its original quality.

zh.title: 裁剪PDF
zh.metaDescription: 裁剪PDF页面以删除边距和不需要的区域。精确修剪PDF文档。
zh.description:
裁剪PDF允许您修剪边距并从PDF页面中删除不需要的区域。这对于删除多余的空白、聚焦特定内容区域或标准化页面尺寸非常有用。

您可以统一裁剪所有页面或单独调整每个页面。可视界面准确显示将保留的内容，使您能够轻松获得精确的结果。

所有裁剪操作都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择要裁剪的文档。

howToUse.title: 定义裁剪区域
howToUse.description: 拖动裁剪手柄定义要保留的区域，或输入精确的尺寸。

howToUse.title: 应用到页面
howToUse.description: 选择将裁剪应用到所有页面或选择特定页面进行裁剪。

howToUse.title: 裁剪并下载
howToUse.description: 点击裁剪应用更改并下载裁剪后的PDF。

useCases.title: 删除边距
useCases.description: 修剪扫描文档或具有大边框的PDF的过多边距。

useCases.title: 聚焦内容
useCases.description: 裁剪以突出特定内容区域，删除页眉、页脚或侧边栏。

useCases.title: 标准化页面
useCases.description: 通过裁剪到统一尺寸使所有页面大小相同。

faq.question: 裁剪会永久删除内容吗？
faq.answer: 是的，裁剪会删除裁剪区域外的内容。请确保保留原始文件的备份。

faq.question: 可以对不同页面进行不同的裁剪吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以对单个页面或页面组应用不同的裁剪设置。

faq.question: 裁剪会影响文本质量吗？
faq.answer: 不会，裁剪只删除裁剪边界外的区域。剩余内容保持原始质量。

en.title: Extract Pages
en.metaDescription: Extract specific pages from PDF files. Select and save individual pages as new documents.
en.description:
Extract Pages allows you to select and save specific pages from a PDF document as new files. This is perfect for pulling out relevant sections, creating excerpts, or separating combined documents.

You can extract individual pages, page ranges, or multiple non-consecutive pages. The visual page preview makes it easy to identify and select exactly the pages you need.

All extraction happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document from which you want to extract pages.

howToUse.title: Select Pages
howToUse.description: Click on page thumbnails to select them, or enter page numbers and ranges in the input field.

howToUse.title: Extract and Download
howToUse.description: Click Extract to create a new PDF with your selected pages and download it.

useCases.title: Create Excerpts
useCases.description: Extract relevant pages from reports or books to create focused reference documents.

useCases.title: Share Specific Content
useCases.description: Pull out specific pages to share without sending the entire document.

useCases.title: Archive Important Pages
useCases.description: Extract and save key pages from documents for long-term archival.

faq.question: Can I extract non-consecutive pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can select any combination of pages, whether consecutive or scattered throughout the document.

faq.question: Will bookmarks be preserved?
faq.answer: Bookmarks that point to extracted pages are preserved in the new document.

faq.question: Can I extract pages from multiple PDFs?
faq.answer: This tool works with one PDF at a time. For combining pages from multiple PDFs, use the Merge PDF tool.

zh.title: 提取页面
zh.metaDescription: 从PDF文件中提取特定页面。选择并保存单个页面为新文档。
zh.description:
提取页面允许您从PDF文档中选择并保存特定页面为新文件。这非常适合提取相关部分、创建摘录或分离合并的文档。

您可以提取单个页面、页面范围或多个不连续的页面。可视页面预览使您能够轻松识别和选择所需的页面。

所有提取操作都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择要从中提取页面的文档。

howToUse.title: 选择页面
howToUse.description: 点击页面缩略图选择它们，或在输入字段中输入页码和范围。

howToUse.title: 提取并下载
howToUse.description: 点击提取创建包含所选页面的新PDF并下载。

useCases.title: 创建摘录
useCases.description: 从报告或书籍中提取相关页面以创建重点参考文档。

useCases.title: 分享特定内容
useCases.description: 提取特定页面进行分享，无需发送整个文档。

useCases.title: 存档重要页面
useCases.description: 提取并保存文档中的关键页面以供长期存档。

faq.question: 可以提取不连续的页面吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以选择任意页面组合，无论是连续的还是分散在整个文档中的。

faq.question: 书签会保留吗？
faq.answer: 指向提取页面的书签会保留在新文档中。

faq.question: 可以从多个PDF中提取页面吗？
faq.answer: 此工具一次处理一个PDF。要合并来自多个PDF的页面，请使用合并PDF工具。

en.title: Organize PDF
en.metaDescription: Reorder, duplicate, and delete PDF pages. Drag and drop to reorganize your documents.
en.description:
Organize PDF provides an intuitive drag-and-drop interface for rearranging pages in your PDF documents. Reorder pages, duplicate important sections, or remove unwanted pages with ease.

The visual page thumbnails make it easy to identify content and arrange pages exactly as you need them. Perfect for restructuring documents, creating custom page orders, or cleaning up scanned files.

All organization happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document you want to organize.

howToUse.title: Rearrange Pages
howToUse.description: Drag page thumbnails to reorder them. Click the duplicate or delete buttons on each page as needed.

howToUse.title: Save and Download
howToUse.description: Click Save to apply your changes and download the reorganized PDF.

useCases.title: Fix Page Order
useCases.description: Correct the order of pages that were scanned or combined incorrectly.

useCases.title: Create Custom Order
useCases.description: Arrange pages in a specific sequence for presentations or reports.

useCases.title: Remove Unwanted Pages
useCases.description: Delete blank pages, duplicates, or irrelevant content from documents.

faq.question: Can I duplicate pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can duplicate any page and place the copy anywhere in the document.

faq.question: Is there an undo function?
faq.answer: Yes, you can undo and redo changes. You can also reset to the original order at any time.

faq.question: Can I organize multiple PDFs together?
faq.answer: This tool works with one PDF at a time. To combine and organize multiple PDFs, first merge them using the Merge PDF tool.

zh.title: 整理PDF
zh.metaDescription: 重新排序、复制和删除PDF页面。拖放重新整理您的文档。
zh.description:
整理PDF提供直观的拖放界面来重新排列PDF文档中的页面。轻松重新排序页面、复制重要部分或删除不需要的页面。

可视页面缩略图使您能够轻松识别内容并按需排列页面。非常适合重组文档、创建自定义页面顺序或清理扫描文件。

所有整理操作都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择要整理的文档。

howToUse.title: 重新排列页面
howToUse.description: 拖动页面缩略图重新排序。根据需要点击每个页面上的复制或删除按钮。

howToUse.title: 保存并下载
howToUse.description: 点击保存应用更改并下载重新整理的PDF。

useCases.title: 修复页面顺序
useCases.description: 纠正扫描或合并错误的页面顺序。

useCases.title: 创建自定义顺序
useCases.description: 为演示文稿或报告按特定顺序排列页面。

useCases.title: 删除不需要的页面
useCases.description: 从文档中删除空白页、重复页或不相关的内容。

faq.question: 可以复制页面吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以复制任何页面并将副本放置在文档中的任何位置。

faq.question: 有撤销功能吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以撤销和重做更改。您也可以随时重置为原始顺序。

faq.question: 可以同时整理多个PDF吗？
faq.answer: 此工具一次处理一个PDF。要合并和整理多个PDF，请先使用合并PDF工具合并它们。

en.title: Delete Pages
en.metaDescription: Remove unwanted pages from PDF files. Select and delete specific pages easily.
en.description:
Delete Pages allows you to remove unwanted pages from your PDF documents quickly and easily. Whether you need to remove blank pages, outdated content, or sensitive information, this tool makes it simple.

Visual page thumbnails help you identify exactly which pages to remove. You can delete individual pages or multiple pages at once.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document from which you want to delete pages.

howToUse.title: Select Pages to Delete
howToUse.description: Click on page thumbnails to mark them for deletion, or enter page numbers in the input field.

howToUse.title: Delete and Download
howToUse.description: Click Delete to remove the selected pages and download your updated PDF.

useCases.title: Remove Blank Pages
useCases.description: Clean up documents by removing accidentally included blank pages.

useCases.title: Remove Sensitive Content
useCases.description: Delete pages containing confidential information before sharing documents.

useCases.title: Streamline Documents
useCases.description: Remove outdated or irrelevant pages to create more focused documents.

faq.question: Can I recover deleted pages?
faq.answer: Deletion is permanent in the output file. Keep a backup of your original document if you might need the pages later.

faq.question: Can I delete multiple pages at once?
faq.answer: Yes, you can select and delete multiple pages simultaneously.

faq.question: Will deleting pages affect bookmarks?
faq.answer: Bookmarks pointing to deleted pages will be removed. Bookmarks to remaining pages are preserved.

zh.title: 删除页面
zh.metaDescription: 从PDF文件中删除不需要的页面。轻松选择和删除特定页面。
zh.description:
删除页面允许您快速轻松地从PDF文档中删除不需要的页面。无论您需要删除空白页、过时内容还是敏感信息，这个工具都能简化操作。

可视页面缩略图帮助您准确识别要删除的页面。您可以删除单个页面或一次删除多个页面。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择要从中删除页面的文档。

howToUse.title: 选择要删除的页面
howToUse.description: 点击页面缩略图标记要删除的页面，或在输入字段中输入页码。

howToUse.title: 删除并下载
howToUse.description: 点击删除移除所选页面并下载更新后的PDF。

useCases.title: 删除空白页
useCases.description: 通过删除意外包含的空白页来清理文档。

useCases.title: 删除敏感内容
useCases.description: 在共享文档前删除包含机密信息的页面。

useCases.title: 精简文档
useCases.description: 删除过时或不相关的页面以创建更集中的文档。

faq.question: 可以恢复已删除的页面吗？
faq.answer: 删除在输出文件中是永久的。如果以后可能需要这些页面，请保留原始文档的备份。

faq.question: 可以一次删除多个页面吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以同时选择和删除多个页面。

faq.question: 删除页面会影响书签吗？
faq.answer: 指向已删除页面的书签将被移除。指向剩余页面的书签会保留。

en.title: Edit Bookmarks
en.metaDescription: Add, edit, and manage PDF bookmarks. Create navigation structure for your documents.
en.description:
Edit Bookmarks allows you to create, modify, and organize bookmarks in your PDF documents. Bookmarks provide quick navigation to specific sections, making long documents easier to use.

You can add new bookmarks, edit existing ones, reorganize the bookmark hierarchy, or import bookmarks from external sources. This tool is essential for creating professional, navigable documents.

All editing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document you want to edit.

howToUse.title: Manage Bookmarks
howToUse.description: Add new bookmarks, edit existing ones, or drag to reorganize the hierarchy.

howToUse.title: Save and Download
howToUse.description: Click Save to apply your changes and download the PDF with updated bookmarks.

useCases.title: Create Navigation
useCases.description: Add bookmarks to long documents to help readers navigate to specific sections quickly.

useCases.title: Organize Chapters
useCases.description: Create a hierarchical bookmark structure that mirrors your document's chapter organization.

useCases.title: Improve Accessibility
useCases.description: Add bookmarks to make documents more accessible and user-friendly.

faq.question: Can I create nested bookmarks?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create a hierarchical structure with parent and child bookmarks.

faq.question: Can I import bookmarks from a file?
faq.answer: Yes, you can import bookmark structures from JSON or text files.

faq.question: Will bookmarks work in all PDF readers?
faq.answer: Yes, bookmarks are a standard PDF feature supported by all major PDF readers.

zh.title: 编辑书签
zh.metaDescription: 添加、编辑和管理PDF书签。为您的文档创建导航结构。
zh.description:
编辑书签允许您在PDF文档中创建、修改和整理书签。书签提供快速导航到特定部分的功能，使长文档更易于使用。

您可以添加新书签、编辑现有书签、重新整理书签层次结构或从外部来源导入书签。这个工具对于创建专业、可导航的文档至关重要。

所有编辑都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择要编辑的文档。

howToUse.title: 管理书签
howToUse.description: 添加新书签、编辑现有书签或拖动重新整理层次结构。

howToUse.title: 保存并下载
howToUse.description: 点击保存应用更改并下载带有更新书签的PDF。

useCases.title: 创建导航
useCases.description: 为长文档添加书签，帮助读者快速导航到特定部分。

useCases.title: 整理章节
useCases.description: 创建反映文档章节组织的层次书签结构。

useCases.title: 提高可访问性
useCases.description: 添加书签使文档更易于访问和用户友好。

faq.question: 可以创建嵌套书签吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以创建具有父书签和子书签的层次结构。

faq.question: 可以从文件导入书签吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以从JSON或文本文件导入书签结构。

faq.question: 书签在所有PDF阅读器中都能工作吗？
faq.answer: 是的，书签是所有主要PDF阅读器都支持的标准PDF功能。

en.title: Table of Contents
en.metaDescription: Generate a table of contents for your PDF. Create clickable navigation from bookmarks.
en.description:
Table of Contents generates a navigable table of contents page for your PDF documents. The TOC can be created from existing bookmarks or custom entries, providing readers with an overview and quick navigation.

Customize the appearance with different styles, fonts, and layouts. The generated TOC includes clickable links that jump directly to the referenced pages.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document.

howToUse.title: Configure TOC
howToUse.description: Choose to generate from bookmarks or create custom entries. Select style and positioning options.

howToUse.title: Generate and Download
howToUse.description: Click Generate to create the table of contents and download your updated PDF.

useCases.title: Academic Papers
useCases.description: Add a professional table of contents to theses, dissertations, and research papers.

useCases.title: Business Reports
useCases.description: Create navigable reports with clear section listings for stakeholders.

useCases.title: User Manuals
useCases.description: Generate comprehensive TOCs for technical documentation and user guides.

faq.question: Can I customize the TOC appearance?
faq.answer: Yes, you can choose from different styles, fonts, and layouts for your table of contents.

faq.question: Where is the TOC inserted?
faq.answer: By default, the TOC is inserted at the beginning of the document, but you can choose a different location.

faq.question: Are the TOC entries clickable?
faq.answer: Yes, each entry is a clickable link that navigates to the corresponding page.

zh.title: 目录
zh.metaDescription: 为您的PDF生成目录。从书签创建可点击的导航。
zh.description:
目录为您的PDF文档生成可导航的目录页面。目录可以从现有书签或自定义条目创建，为读者提供概览和快速导航。

使用不同的样式、字体和布局自定义外观。生成的目录包含可点击的链接，直接跳转到引用的页面。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择文档。

howToUse.title: 配置目录
howToUse.description: 选择从书签生成或创建自定义条目。选择样式和位置选项。

howToUse.title: 生成并下载
howToUse.description: 点击生成创建目录并下载更新后的PDF。

useCases.title: 学术论文
useCases.description: 为论文、学位论文和研究报告添加专业目录。

useCases.title: 商业报告
useCases.description: 为利益相关者创建具有清晰章节列表的可导航报告。

useCases.title: 用户手册
useCases.description: 为技术文档和用户指南生成全面的目录。

faq.question: 可以自定义目录外观吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以为目录选择不同的样式、字体和布局。

faq.question: 目录插入在哪里？
faq.answer: 默认情况下，目录插入在文档开头，但您可以选择不同的位置。

faq.question: 目录条目可以点击吗？
faq.answer: 是的，每个条目都是可点击的链接，导航到相应的页面。

en.title: Page Numbers
en.metaDescription: Add page numbers to PDF documents. Customize position, format, and starting number.
en.description:
Page Numbers adds customizable page numbering to your PDF documents. Choose from various formats, positions, and styles to match your document's design.

You can set the starting number, skip certain pages, and use different numbering formats (1, 2, 3 or i, ii, iii). Perfect for creating professional documents with proper pagination.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document.

howToUse.title: Configure Numbering
howToUse.description: Choose position, format, starting number, and which pages to number.

howToUse.title: Apply and Download
howToUse.description: Click Apply to add page numbers and download your updated PDF.

useCases.title: Professional Documents
useCases.description: Add page numbers to reports, proposals, and business documents.

useCases.title: Academic Papers
useCases.description: Number pages according to academic formatting requirements.

useCases.title: Legal Documents
useCases.description: Add proper pagination to contracts and legal filings.

faq.question: Can I skip the first page?
faq.answer: Yes, you can specify which pages to number and which to skip, such as title pages or cover pages.

faq.question: What number formats are available?
faq.answer: You can use Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3), Roman numerals (i, ii, iii or I, II, III), or letters (a, b, c).

faq.question: Can I add "Page X of Y" format?
faq.answer: Yes, you can include the total page count in your numbering format.

zh.title: 页码
zh.metaDescription: 为PDF文档添加页码。自定义位置、格式和起始编号。
zh.description:
页码为您的PDF文档添加可自定义的页码编号。从各种格式、位置和样式中选择以匹配您文档的设计。

您可以设置起始编号、跳过某些页面并使用不同的编号格式（1, 2, 3 或 i, ii, iii）。非常适合创建具有正确分页的专业文档。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择文档。

howToUse.title: 配置编号
howToUse.description: 选择位置、格式、起始编号以及要编号的页面。

howToUse.title: 应用并下载
howToUse.description: 点击应用添加页码并下载更新后的PDF。

useCases.title: 专业文档
useCases.description: 为报告、提案和商业文档添加页码。

useCases.title: 学术论文
useCases.description: 根据学术格式要求编号页面。

useCases.title: 法律文档
useCases.description: 为合同和法律文件添加正确的分页。

faq.question: 可以跳过第一页吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以指定要编号的页面和要跳过的页面，如标题页或封面页。

faq.question: 有哪些编号格式可用？
faq.answer: 您可以使用阿拉伯数字（1, 2, 3）、罗马数字（i, ii, iii 或 I, II, III）或字母（a, b, c）。

faq.question: 可以添加"第X页，共Y页"格式吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以在编号格式中包含总页数。

en.title: Add Watermark
en.metaDescription: Add text or image watermarks to PDF files. Protect and brand your documents.
en.description:
Add Watermark allows you to place text or image watermarks on your PDF documents. Watermarks can indicate document status (Draft, Confidential), add branding, or deter unauthorized copying.

Customize the watermark's position, size, opacity, rotation, and color. Apply to all pages or select specific pages. The tool supports both text watermarks and image watermarks.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document.

howToUse.title: Create Watermark
howToUse.description: Enter text or upload an image for your watermark. Adjust position, size, opacity, and rotation.

howToUse.title: Apply and Download
howToUse.description: Click Apply to add the watermark and download your updated PDF.

useCases.title: Document Protection
useCases.description: Add "Confidential" or "Draft" watermarks to indicate document status.

useCases.title: Brand Documents
useCases.description: Add company logos or names to official documents.

useCases.title: Copyright Notice
useCases.description: Add copyright information to protect intellectual property.

faq.question: Can I use an image as a watermark?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload PNG, JPG, or SVG images to use as watermarks.

faq.question: Can I make the watermark semi-transparent?
faq.answer: Yes, you can adjust the opacity from fully transparent to fully opaque.

faq.question: Can I apply different watermarks to different pages?
faq.answer: The tool applies the same watermark to selected pages. For different watermarks, process the document multiple times.

zh.title: 添加水印
zh.metaDescription: 为PDF文件添加文本或图像水印。保护和品牌化您的文档。
zh.description:
添加水印允许您在PDF文档上放置文本或图像水印。水印可以指示文档状态（草稿、机密）、添加品牌或阻止未经授权的复制。

自定义水印的位置、大小、不透明度、旋转和颜色。应用到所有页面或选择特定页面。该工具支持文本水印和图像水印。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择文档。

howToUse.title: 创建水印
howToUse.description: 输入文本或上传图像作为水印。调整位置、大小、不透明度和旋转。

howToUse.title: 应用并下载
howToUse.description: 点击应用添加水印并下载更新后的PDF。

useCases.title: 文档保护
useCases.description: 添加"机密"或"草稿"水印以指示文档状态。

useCases.title: 品牌文档
useCases.description: 为官方文档添加公司标志或名称。

useCases.title: 版权声明
useCases.description: 添加版权信息以保护知识产权。

faq.question: 可以使用图像作为水印吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以上传PNG、JPG或SVG图像作为水印。

faq.question: 可以使水印半透明吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以调整不透明度，从完全透明到完全不透明。

faq.question: 可以对不同页面应用不同的水印吗？
faq.answer: 该工具对选定的页面应用相同的水印。对于不同的水印，需要多次处理文档。

en.title: Header & Footer
en.metaDescription: Add headers and footers to PDF documents. Include page numbers, dates, and custom text.
en.description:
Header & Footer adds customizable headers and footers to your PDF documents. Include page numbers, dates, document titles, or any custom text in the header or footer areas.

Position content on the left, center, or right of the header/footer. Use different content for odd and even pages if needed. Perfect for creating professional documents with consistent formatting.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document.

howToUse.title: Configure Header/Footer
howToUse.description: Enter text for header and footer areas. Add page numbers, dates, or custom text.

howToUse.title: Apply and Download
howToUse.description: Click Apply to add headers/footers and download your updated PDF.

useCases.title: Business Documents
useCases.description: Add company name and page numbers to professional documents.

useCases.title: Legal Documents
useCases.description: Include case numbers, dates, and page references in legal filings.

useCases.title: Academic Papers
useCases.description: Add running headers with paper title and author name.

faq.question: Can I have different headers on odd and even pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can configure different content for odd and even pages.

faq.question: Can I include the current date?
faq.answer: Yes, you can insert dynamic date fields that show the current date.

faq.question: Can I skip the header/footer on certain pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can specify which pages should have headers/footers and which should be skipped.

zh.title: 页眉页脚
zh.metaDescription: 为PDF文档添加页眉和页脚。包含页码、日期和自定义文本。
zh.description:
页眉页脚为您的PDF文档添加可自定义的页眉和页脚。在页眉或页脚区域包含页码、日期、文档标题或任何自定义文本。

将内容定位在页眉/页脚的左侧、中间或右侧。如果需要，可以为奇数页和偶数页使用不同的内容。非常适合创建具有一致格式的专业文档。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择文档。

howToUse.title: 配置页眉/页脚
howToUse.description: 为页眉和页脚区域输入文本。添加页码、日期或自定义文本。

howToUse.title: 应用并下载
howToUse.description: 点击应用添加页眉/页脚并下载更新后的PDF。

useCases.title: 商业文档
useCases.description: 为专业文档添加公司名称和页码。

useCases.title: 法律文档
useCases.description: 在法律文件中包含案件编号、日期和页面引用。

useCases.title: 学术论文
useCases.description: 添加带有论文标题和作者姓名的页眉。

faq.question: 可以在奇数页和偶数页上有不同的页眉吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以为奇数页和偶数页配置不同的内容。

faq.question: 可以包含当前日期吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以插入显示当前日期的动态日期字段。

faq.question: 可以在某些页面上跳过页眉/页脚吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以指定哪些页面应该有页眉/页脚，哪些应该跳过。

en.title: Form Filler
en.metaDescription: Fill PDF forms online. Complete interactive PDF forms without printing.
en.description:
Form Filler allows you to complete interactive PDF forms directly in your browser. Fill text fields, check boxes, select options, and add signatures without printing the document.

The tool supports standard PDF forms and XFA forms. Your filled data can be saved and the form can be flattened to prevent further editing.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your form data remains private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF Form
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF form or click to select the file.

howToUse.title: Fill the Form
howToUse.description: Click on form fields to enter text, check boxes, or select options.

howToUse.title: Save and Download
howToUse.description: Click Save to preserve your entries and download the filled form.

useCases.title: Application Forms
useCases.description: Complete job applications, permit applications, and registration forms.

useCases.title: Tax Forms
useCases.description: Fill out tax documents and financial forms electronically.

useCases.title: Contracts
useCases.description: Complete contract forms with your information before signing.

faq.question: Can I save my progress?
faq.answer: Yes, you can save partially filled forms and continue later.

faq.question: What is form flattening?
faq.answer: Flattening converts form fields to static content, preventing further editing.

faq.question: Are XFA forms supported?
faq.answer: Yes, the tool supports both standard AcroForms and XFA forms.

zh.title: 表单填写
zh.metaDescription: 在线填写PDF表单。无需打印即可完成交互式PDF表单。
zh.description:
表单填写允许您直接在浏览器中完成交互式PDF表单。填写文本字段、勾选复选框、选择选项并添加签名，无需打印文档。

该工具支持标准PDF表单和XFA表单。您填写的数据可以保存，表单可以扁平化以防止进一步编辑。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的表单数据保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF表单
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF表单或点击选择文件。

howToUse.title: 填写表单
howToUse.description: 点击表单字段输入文本、勾选复选框或选择选项。

howToUse.title: 保存并下载
howToUse.description: 点击保存保留您的输入并下载已填写的表单。

useCases.title: 申请表
useCases.description: 完成工作申请、许可申请和注册表单。

useCases.title: 税务表单
useCases.description: 电子填写税务文件和财务表单。

useCases.title: 合同
useCases.description: 在签署前用您的信息完成合同表单。

faq.question: 可以保存进度吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以保存部分填写的表单并稍后继续。

faq.question: 什么是表单扁平化？
faq.answer: 扁平化将表单字段转换为静态内容，防止进一步编辑。

faq.question: 支持XFA表单吗？
faq.answer: 是的，该工具支持标准AcroForms和XFA表单。

en.title: Form Creator
en.metaDescription: Create fillable PDF forms. Add text fields, checkboxes, and dropdowns to documents.
en.description:
Form Creator transforms static PDF documents into interactive fillable forms. Add text fields, checkboxes, radio buttons, dropdowns, and more to create professional forms.

Drag and drop form elements onto your document, configure field properties, and create forms that can be filled electronically. Perfect for creating applications, surveys, and data collection forms.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select the document to convert into a form.

howToUse.title: Add Form Fields
howToUse.description: Select field types from the toolbar and click to place them on the document.

howToUse.title: Configure and Save
howToUse.description: Set field properties, then save and download your fillable PDF form.

useCases.title: Application Forms
useCases.description: Create fillable job applications, membership forms, and registrations.

useCases.title: Surveys
useCases.description: Build interactive surveys and questionnaires for data collection.

useCases.title: Order Forms
useCases.description: Create product order forms with quantity fields and checkboxes.

faq.question: What field types can I add?
faq.answer: Text fields, checkboxes, radio buttons, dropdowns, date pickers, and signature fields.

faq.question: Can I make fields required?
faq.answer: Yes, you can mark fields as required and add validation rules.

faq.question: Can I add calculations?

All extraction happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

faq.question: What image formats are extracted?
faq.answer: Images are extracted in their native format (JPEG, PNG, etc.) when possible, or converted to PNG for raw image data.

faq.question: Why are some images missing?
faq.answer: Small images below the size threshold are filtered out. Adjust the filter settings to extract smaller images.

faq.answer: Scanned PDFs typically contain the scan as one large image per page. Use PDF to Image tool instead for page-by-page conversion.

zh.title: 从PDF提取图片

Preview all matches before applying redactions, and selectively choose which occurrences to redact. Supports case-sensitive search, whole word matching, and regular expressions for advanced pattern matching.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

en.title: Font to Outline
en.metaDescription: Remove font dependencies from PDF documents by converting pages to high-quality images. Ensures compatibility across all systems.
en.description:
Font to Outline removes all font dependencies from your PDF by converting each page into high-quality rasterized content. This ensures your document looks exactly the same on any system, even if the original fonts are not installed.

The tool renders each page at your chosen DPI (150-600), removing embedded fonts while preserving the exact visual appearance. Optionally, you can add an invisible text layer to maintain searchability.

This is essential for print preparation, cross-platform compatibility, and avoiding font licensing issues when sharing documents. All processing happens locally in your browser.

useCases.title: Font Licensing
useCases.description: Remove embedded fonts to avoid licensing concerns when distributing documents.

faq.question: How does this work?
faq.answer: The tool renders each page at high resolution (your chosen DPI) and recreates the PDF from these images, removing all font dependencies while preserving visual appearance.

faq.question: Can I still select text after conversion?
faq.answer: By default, no. Text becomes part of the image. However, you can enable "Preserve searchable text" to add an invisible text layer for search and copy functionality.

faq.question: What DPI should I use?
faq.answer: 300 DPI is recommended for print-quality output. 150 DPI is sufficient for screen viewing and produces smaller files. 600 DPI is for highest quality but creates large files.

faq.question: Will file size increase?
faq.answer: File size depends on DPI and content. 150 DPI usually produces smaller files, 300 DPI may increase size, 600 DPI significantly increases size. Compression is automatically applied.

faq.question: Is this reversible?
faq.answer: No, font data is permanently removed. Keep a backup of the original if you need editable text with the original fonts.

faq.question: What about vector graphics?
faq.answer: Vector graphics (shapes, lines) in the original PDF will be converted to raster along with text. The visual quality is preserved at your chosen DPI.

这对于打印准备、跨平台兼容性以及在共享文档时避免字体许可问题至关重要。所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行。

faq.answer: 该工具以高分辨率（您选择的DPI）渲染每个页面，并从这些图像重新创建PDF，删除所有字体依赖同时保留视觉外观。

faq.answer: 默认情况下不能。文本成为图像的一部分。但是，您可以启用"保留可搜索文本"以添加不可见的文本层用于搜索和复制功能。

faq.question: 文件大小会增加吗？

faq.question: What are PDF layers (OCG)?
faq.answer: Optional Content Groups (OCG) are layers in a PDF that can be shown or hidden. They are commonly used in CAD drawings, maps, and complex documents.

faq.question: Why does my PDF show no layers?
faq.answer: Not all PDFs contain layers. Layers are typically added during PDF creation from design software or CAD applications.

faq.question: Will layer changes affect the original content?
faq.answer: Layer visibility changes only affect what is displayed or printed. The actual content remains in the document.

en.title: PDF Reader
en.metaDescription: Free online PDF reader. View, navigate, zoom, rotate, and print PDF documents directly in your browser.
en.description:
PDF Reader is a full-featured PDF viewer that lets you read and navigate PDF documents directly in your browser. No software installation required - just upload your PDF and start reading.

Navigate between pages, zoom in and out, rotate the view, and use fullscreen mode for distraction-free reading. You can also print documents or download them for offline access.

All viewing happens locally in your browser. Your documents are never uploaded to any server, ensuring complete privacy.

faq.question: Is my document secure?
faq.answer: Yes, your document is processed entirely in your browser and is never uploaded to any server.

faq.question: Can I annotate or edit the PDF?
faq.answer: This tool is for viewing only. Use our Sign PDF or Annotate PDF tools for editing.

faq.question: Does it work on mobile devices?
faq.answer: Yes, the PDF Reader works on all devices with a modern web browser.
